task_description: Call three services to perform a cross-service health check, collecting status, latency, and version info from each, then produce a combined health report.

services.name: service-a
services.description: Returns health status of the user service

services.name: service-b
services.description: Returns health status of the inventory service

services.name: service-c
services.description: Returns health status of the order service

input_data.aggregation_instructions: Collect health status from all three services and produce a combined health report indicating overall system status (healthy only if all services are healthy).
